# PreStruct — Pracownia Konstrukcyjna / Structural Design Studio

> Structural design studio based in Gdańsk, Poland, specializing in precast, reinforced concrete, and prestressed structures. Formerly known as Konstrukcje WM.

## Company Facts
- **Founded in**: Gdańsk, Poland
- **Specialization**: Precast concrete structures, reinforced concrete, prestressed/post-tensioned concrete
- **Markets served**: Poland, Sweden, Denmark, Germany
- **Documentation languages**: Polish, English, German
- **Software**: ALLPLAN, PLANBAR (industry standard for precast)
- **File formats**: .pxml, .uni (ready for automated production lines), PDF, DWG
- **Contact**: biuro@konstrukcje-wm.pl | +48 791 392 370
- **Address**: ul. Sarnia 6, 80-336 Gdańsk, Poland

## Services

### Precast Structure Design
Design of columns, beams, foundation beams, walls, and prestressed girders. Floor slab documentation including hollow-core and filigree systems. Files ready for PLANBAR and Avermann/ELiPLAN production lines. Production documentation, not just engineering documentation.

### Reinforced Concrete Design
Technical and detailed design for all types of reinforced concrete structures. Specializing in structures requiring high precision and Eurocode compliance adapted to local national standards (Poland, Sweden, Denmark, Germany).

### Prestressed and Post-tensioned Concrete Design
Technological designs, prestressing programs, workshop drawings, and detailed designs for pretensioned and post-tensioned elements. Experience with projects in PL, SE, DK, DE.

### Technical Consulting
Cast-in-place to precast conversion analysis with free preliminary comparison. Cost and timeline comparison of monolithic vs. precast variants. Coordination with precast factory from design stage.

### Design Partnership
Active participation in joint tender preparation. Close collaboration with architects, general contractors, and precast manufacturers. Long-term partnership model with factories.

## Key Differentiators
- One of the few studios in Poland that understands precast production from the inside
- Files delivered directly compatible with automated production lines — no rework needed
- Multi-market expertise with documentation compliant to local Eurocode annexes
- BIM-native workflow in ALLPLAN/PLANBAR

## Notable Projects
- **Residential building Malmö, Sweden** — Full prefabrication of walls, floors, and balconies (6 and 10 stories)
- **IKEA Copenhagen, Denmark** — Large-format commercial facility with multi-supplier precast coordination
- **Kv Giffeln, Örebro, Sweden** — Residential project with complex geometry

## FAQ
- **How long does a precast design take?** A typical multi-family building (4–8 stories) takes 8–14 weeks from complete architectural design.
- **Do you work with factories outside Poland?** Yes — regularly in Sweden, Denmark, and Germany.
- **Is it worth converting cast-in-place to precast?** Often yes. We offer free preliminary analysis comparing both options.
- **What software do you use?** ALLPLAN and PLANBAR with .pxml and .uni output files.

- English: https://prestruct-pl.github.io/en.html
